title: Air Tools
body:
This mod adds 5 new tools that are crafted from feathers.
They have the same stats as iron tools, but with an air-themed twist!

Features

1. Air Sword
2. Air Pickaxe
3. Air Axe
4. Air Shovel
5. Air Hoe



Tools function exactly like iron tools. Just a fun, lightweight addition for players who want air-themed gear.
